nasb.text: Then when lust has conceived, it gives birth to sin; and when sin is accomplished, it brings forth death.

esv.text: Then desire when it has conceived gives birth to sin, and sin when it is fully grown brings forth death.

cnv.text: 私慾懷了胎，就生出罪；罪長成了，就產生死亡。

ccb.text: 私欲怀了胎，便生出罪，罪一旦长成，便带来死亡。

csbs.text: 一旦欲望怀了胎，就生下罪来；罪长成了，就生出死亡。
